scripts.build: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const isWin = process.platform === 'win32'; const cmd = isWin ? 'pwsh' : 'sh'; const args = isWin ? ['-File', './scripts/azd-prepackage.ps1'] : ['./scripts/azd-prepackage.sh']; const r = spawnSync(cmd, args, { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
